entry.title: Re: How to fetch the data from a page in SAC dashboard fo...
entry.content:
Hi  Rahul90,

I want to suggest to look at the dataexport api: api/v1/dataexport | SAP Help Portal. Here you can directly request (pull) data from a SAC import model.

If you want to export data directly from a table there are options via scripting to read the data. But it's definitely not for large volumes of data. It's an analytics / visualization tool, not a data platform. The table widget is not designed for that purpose.

Kind regards,
Martijn van Foeken | Interdobs

entry.title: Re: HANA Calculated coulmn to derive sum of Quantity
entry.content:
If it is only for one specific packing station like in your example, then restricted columns with restriction "Dock Packing" might be the way to go.

If you want the sum for all packing stations then it would be a normal aggregation grouped by packing_station. Depending on the required granularity you might want to create a separate aggregation node only for this aggregation.

entry.title: Automate ANAF UIT PDF email transmission.
entry.content:
Dears,

We need your support for implementing an automatic job to transmit the UIT document generated in pdf format from the ANAF platform to SAP Inbox or by email to a specific distribution list.

entry.title: Re: Retention period for tasks completed in Build Process Automation
entry.content: And the filter is set to show Completed instances? By default, Completed instances are not shown. Perhaps there is a setting that removes them from the list but I am not aware of that.

entry.title: SAP Signavio at SAP Sapphire 2025 in Orlando - everything you need to know!
entry.content:
Hello process owners and transformation leads!

The countdown to SAP Sapphire 2025 in Orlando has officially begun and we’re excited to share everything on SAP Signavio at the event with you ! In just less than two weeks, we will see you again in Orlando for our annual three-day, in-person flagship event to discover how SAP helps organizations turn potential into performance and make "your best" a reality through value-driven transformation and process excellence.

This year, we’re especially excited to be part of the official Business Transformation Management track. Within this track you will be able to learn more about how to optimize your business processes, simplify and modernize your IT, and streamline digital adoption for holistic, data-driven business transformation.

To help you make the most of your time, we’ve put together a guide to the top SAP Signavio sessions, speakers, and opportunities you simply can’t miss.

 

Must Attend SAP Signavio Sessions 🔎

Product Sessions

May 20, 11:30-11:50am –  Crafting the future: The SAP Signavio solutions 2025 road map with Dr. Andre Wenz

May 20, 2-2:20pm – Powering process-centric, agentic AI strategies with SAP Signavio with Syeda Noor Zehra Naqvi

May 21, 10:30-10:50am – SAP Signavio roadmap highlights to enhance the integrated toolchain with Silvio Arcangeli

May 21, 1:30-1:50pm – Process optimization opportunities with SAP Signavio and WalkMe solutions with Dr. Andre Wenz and Ariel Sanchez

Customer Success Stories

May 20, 2-2:20pm – Driving improvement and automation across the supply chain at Takeda

May 20, 3-3:20pm – Build the case for a utilities business transformation program with Southern California Edison

May 21, 10:30-10:50am – Value-driven business process transformation at Nissan with SAP Signavio​

May 21, 2-2:20pm – Unlock the future: AI-enabled process mining with SAP Signavio at Mondi​

Thought Leadership

May 20, 2-2:20pm – Why business transformations struggle—and how to fix it with Oxford Economics and Nexa Resources

For more information on all the sessions and details, please see here and remember to add these sessions to your agenda!

 

Visit Us on the Show Floor 💬

Visit us at our demo station: BTM2533

Explore new capabilities available for SAP Signavio and discover the latest on

  • SAP Signavio and the Integrated toolchain​
  • Value identification and realization​
  • Process AI​

You can find us within the Business Transformation Management track located on the show floor. Be sure to visit us with your process questions on all thing s SAP Signavio and start your journey to value-driven transformation!

 

Talk with Us 1-on-1 🤝

Looking for personalized guidance on your transformation goals?

Schedule a private meeting with one of our SAP Signavio solution experts at the welcome desk in the Expert Center. Whether you’re exploring your first use case or scaling enterprise-wide transformation, we’re here to support you with deep product knowledge and tailored insights.

 

Don’t Forget! 🎤

Jessica Alba will join us on Wednesday afternoon for an inspiring closing keynote:
"How to Lead and Inspire Change"

Get ready to hear from the actress, entrepreneur, and author as she shares her perspective on leadership, resilience, and driving positive impact.

 

Celebrate With Us 🎉

Cap off your SAP Sapphire experience with an unforgettable celebration night at Epcot! Experience the magic at this exciting night of thrilling attractions, international culture and cuisine, science, and fun. Join us for a celebration night you won’t want to miss!

And for our music fans of country and southern rock, we’ve got a special treat for you: private live performance by the multi-platinum, GRAMMY® Award–winning group Zac Brown Band.

 

See you in Orlando! 👋

Whether you’re exploring AI-powered process mining, seeking to build a transformation capability to continuously navigate change, or simply want to connect – SAP Signavio will be there to support your journey every step of the way. Let’s shape the future of business transformation, together!

Can’t make it to Orlando? No worries, SAP Sapphire Madrid is just around the corner, and we’ll be sharing updates and highlights soon. Stay tuned!

entry.title: Re: ME32K/ME31K - Badi/ User exit
entry.content:
The problem is that I need to update the fields that I added( Custom item fields)
and not read their content
This is what I am looking for, a UE/BADI where I can change the value of the fields at the row level (UPDATE)

entry.title: Re: Integrating Open SQL Schema Tables with SAP Datasphere Space using Dataflow
entry.content:
Hello Mrinal_Sinha,

We misunderstood each other...

I consider the "Snapshot use case of Dataflow" a valid case and a closed discussion.

I refer to the pivot example:

View persistency works with Snapshots of data: the view persistency results are managed with 2 tables in hana cloud (one with old data and one with new data). The persistency is done in one table and then the tables are swapped inside the exposed Views. (persistency works as a snapshot in that sense, no partial commit).

 

So with the use case "reverse pivot", it is more robust than using a dataflow to persist the reverse pivot, as the dataflow is more prone to error and works with batch of data (there is the possibility to have partial data saved, this do not occurr with view persistency).

entry.title: Re: How to add a Excel-File to an existing Dataset (UNION)
entry.content: In this case, you can just load the new file with May 2025 data only into the same model by using the replace query option from data management, you can also reuse the data wrangling and mapping if the file has indentical structure.

entry.title: Re: Can a Free Chrome Extension Transform Your SAP S/4HANA Experience?
entry.content: New Milestone: Over 500 active users weekly 🚀

entry.title: How to Change Logon Language while Using SSO?
entry.content:
You are logging into Business ByDesign using SSO, and notice that there is no option to change the logon language.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Change Logon Language while Using SSO?
entry.content:
To set the logon language when using SSO login you can follow the below steps in your respective browser:

Case 1: In Internet Explorer

  1. Go to Tools option.
  2. Select Internet Options.
  3. Now select Languages and select Language Preference.
  4. Maintain here your preferred Language.
  5. Click Ok.
  6. Restart the browser.

Case 2: In Chrome:

  1. Go to Settings Options in Chrome.
  2. Click on Advanced option.
  3. Add the required language and set this to default.
  4. Restart the browser.

Case 3: In Mozilla Firefox:

  1. Go to Options.
  2. Select Content.
  3. Under the heading Language, click the button Choose.
  4. Now select the Language to add from the dropdown.
  5. Click on Ok.
  6. Restart the browser.

If the steps above do not resolve the reported issue, you can try the following steps:

  1. Open the Business ByDesign tenant without SSO.
  2. Select English in the logon screen and then log on to the system.
  3. Click on the user avatar icon on the top-right of the screen.
  4. Click on My Settings.
  5. Click on Manage Certificates.
  6. Click on Assign Logon Certificate.
  7. This procedure will install a new certificate in your browser with the required language.

You can also refer to KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/2610005

entry.title: How do I filter attachments on an approved Purchase Order before it gets to the supplier in S4HANA
entry.content:
Hi All,

I must filter attachments in a purchase order (PO) email before emailing the purchase order to the supplier in S4HANA. When someone creates a purchase order, they can attach documents to it. I want to be able to filter out some documents attached to the PO when it is approved within the workflow. Is there a BADI for achieving this? 

Thank you so much...

entry.title: Contact person does not update correct based on LINENUM
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to update BP contact person via DTW. I want to make contact persons INACTIVE. I use contact employees template. In that template LINENUM field have to fill up. so sometime it update correct Contact persons. sometimes it does not update correct persons. if I add 0,1 in LINENUM. so it update first and second contact persons. But when I add 1,2,6 like this. so it does not update second, third and fifth contact persons. sometimes it update forth person instead of 6.

Can you please guide me how to make contact persons INACTIVE via DTW?

entry.title: Re: restrict administrator to only create positions for h...
entry.content: hello Ashley, that's what I've done but it doesn't work in position creation

entry.title: Error: "Scoping of SAP intelligent RPA Not permitted, eligible license missing"
entry.content:
When you scope the iRPA/BPA scoping question system displays the below error:

Scoping of SAP intelligent RPA Not permitted, eligible license missing.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error: "Scoping of SAP intelligent RPA Not permitted,...
entry.content:
Scoping of IRPA/BPA is only allowed for Production Tenant and Test Tenant, if you are attempting to perform the scoping in any other tenant then this issue occurs (eg: Sales Demo tenant, Development tenant).

You can scope IRPA/BPA in test and production systems.

Below is also an option to consider:

You can take advantage of the Intelligent RPA trial we offer to achieve the same functionality. Instructions on getting started with a trial version of SAP Intelligent RPA can be found here - Getting Started with the Free Plan for SAP Intelligent RPA.

Furthermore, you can use the trial version to gain access to the Desktop Agent component from the SAP Download Center by following the instructions listed here - On-premise Components Setup.

Once you complete the setup steps explained in Getting Started with a Trial Account in the Cloud Foundry Environment, you will be able to start testing and demoing Intelligent RPA bots for SAP Business ByDesign as described in How to Configure and Orchestrate your IRPA Cloud Factory

You can also refer to KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/3209730

entry.title: F-59 is not available for Public Cloud
entry.content:
We saw that F-59 functionality to handle partial payment processes . Is it available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: F-59 is not available for Public Cloud
entry.content:
F-59 transaction in On Prem is for Payment Request. For F-59 there is no app available in S/4HANA Public Cloud. Unfortunately, there is no standard solution for S/4HANA Public Cloud and therefore there is no such app (and workflow) for this function.

See comments below the blog post.

APP in S/4HANA Cloud for old ECC Transaction Code F-59

If you would like to post partial payments/residual items please use the following Apps instead:

Post Incoming Payments app, Clear Incoming Payments app, and the Reprocess Bank Statement Items app. Likewise for outgoing payments you can use Post Outgoing payments Apps. 

Partial payment is not available in Manage Automatic Payments app in Cloud.

 

You can use the Post Incoming Payments app, the Clear Incoming Payments app and the Reprocess Bank Statement Items app to post partial payments and residual items.

Likewise for outgoing payments you can use Post Outgoing payments Apps.

To create a partial payment a manual step is required in relation to the partial payment amount that you wish to pay. This is not possible in app Manage Automatic Payments.

 

Please check same in our Help Portal:

Partial Payments Versus Residual Items

 

And in Community Q&A:

Partial Payment in APP

entry.title: Re: How can I display the Project Manager's name in the v...
entry.content:
Hi 王詩博,
There is an example, how can you retrieve ProjectManagerName:
1. The first step is to create Data Definition based on I_EntProjectEntitlement and with the association to I_BusinessUserBasic. 

2. The next step is linking I_EnterpriseProject with previously created CDS view.

As a result you will get Project Manager Full Name. Hope it helps you.

BR,

Aliaksandra

entry.title: Getting error "Forbidden Correlation Id: 3041754d-8fda-4ca3-77ea-b2511c759bad" while creating Web an
entry.content:
• Error Message: "Forbidden Correlation Id: 3041754d-8fda-4ca3-77ea-b2511c759bad."
  • BTP Subscription: SAP Build Apps Trial (US10 region)
  • Trial Status: Active
  • Browser: Chrome, Edge (also tested in Incognito mode)
  • Tried Solutions:
    • Checked BTP Cockpit → SAP Build Apps Subscription is active
    • Ensured Role Collections (SAP Build Apps Admin/Developer) are assigned
    • Cleared browser cache & cookies

entry.title: Re: Rep. point does not exist as operation in standard cost estimate Message no. RM094
entry.content: Checking point before standard cost estimation run

entry.title: Re: Express document "Update was terminated" for BAPI BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2
entry.content:
Hi Karthik, "We are calling BAPI_PO_CHANGE inside a loop over the PO item internal table. It works fine for a few records; however, when we process 40 to 50 POs (including line items) at once, we receive the error: 'Express document "Update was terminated" received from author.' In such cases, the changes are not applied. Interestingly, if we run the same data again, the error does not occur, and the details are updated successfully."

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_PO_CHANGE'
    EXPORTING
      PURCHASEORDER                = EKET-EBELN
   TABLES
     RETURN                       = RETURN
     POSCHEDULE                   = LT_POSCHEDULE
     POSCHEDULEX                  = LT_POSCHEDULEX

  READ TABLE RETURN  WITH KEY TYPE = 'E' .                                    
  IF SY-SUBRC IS INITIAL.
    CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'.
              
    DELETE RETURN WHERE TYPE NE 'E'.

    LOOP AT RETURN.
      IT_ERROR-MESS = RETURN-MESSAGE.
      IT_ERROR-PO = T_EKET-EBELN.
      APPEND IT_ERROR.
    ENDLOOP.

  ELSE.
    READ TABLE RETURN  WITH KEY TYPE = 'A' .
    IF SY-SUBRC IS INITIAL.
      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'.

      DELETE RETURN WHERE TYPE NE 'A'.
      LOOP AT RETURN.
        IT_ERROR-MESS = RETURN-MESSAGE.
        IT_ERROR-PO = T_EKET-EBELN.
        APPEND IT_ERROR.
      ENDLOOP.
    ELSE.
      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
      EXPORTING
        WAIT          = 'X'.

      IT_SUCCESS-PO = T_EKET-EBELN.
      IT_SUCCESS-MESS = RETURN-MESSAGE.
      LOOP AT T_POSCHEDULE2 INTO W_POSCHEDULE.                  
        IT_SUCCESS-ITEM = W_POSCHEDULE-PO_ITEM.                 
        IT_SUCCESS-DLV_DATE = W_POSCHEDULE-DELIVERY_DATE.       
        AT END OF PO_ITEM.                                      
          APPEND IT_SUCCESS.
        ENDAT.                                                  
      ENDLOOP.                                                  
      CLEAR IT_SUCCESS.
      CLEAR W_POSCHEDULE.                                       
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

Kind regards
Margit

Try this:

inner join jest as j1 on j1.objnr = aufk.objnr " header
inner join jest as j2 on j2.objnr = afvc.objnr " operation

entry.title: Re: need help connecting Salesforce to SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
I also tried with creating a BTP Destination Rest API in SAP Build Apps - Base url - https://orgfarm-66f4572e77-dev-ed.my.salesforce.com then in retrieve method, in relative path and query I wrote formula - "/services/data/v60.0/query?q=" +"SELECT Name, Delivery_Status__c, Warehouse_Location__c FROM Account WHERE Material_Code__c='" + query.additionalInputs.barcode + "'" and added an additional parameter named - barcode of type text

i got status 500 and this error

{
"message": "Request failed with status code 500",
"name": "AxiosError",
"stack": "AxiosError: Request failed with status code 500\n at We (https://ankita-gsmn2xed.design-time.us10.apps.build.cloud.sap/assets/chunks/requests-B5wF_LQq.js:3:1...n at XMLHttpRequest.b (https://ankita-gsmn2xed.design-time.us10.apps.build.cloud.sap/assets/chunks/requests-B5wF_LQq.js:3:5...n at L.request (https://ankita-gsmn2xed.design-time.us10.apps.build.cloud.sap/assets/chunks/requests-B5wF_LQq.js:5:2...n at async c (https://ankita-gsmn2xed.design-time.us10.apps.build.cloud.sap/assets/chunks/useDestinations-lkjNHCY3...n at kt.request (https://ankita-gsmn2xed.design-time.us10.apps.build.cloud.sap/assets/chunks/index-J4oMTQNd.js:5:2062)",
"config": {
"transitional": {
"silentJSONParsing": true,
"forcedJSONParsing": true,
"clarifyTimeoutError": false
},
"adapter": [
"xhr",
"http",
"fetch"
],
"transformRequest": [
null
],
"transformResponse": [
null
],
"timeout": 0,
"xsrfCookieName": "XSRF-TOKEN",
"xsrfHeaderName": "X-XSRF-TOKEN",
"maxContentLength": -1,
"maxBodyLength": -1,
"env": {},
"headers": {
"Accept": "application/json, text/plain, */*",
"Content-Type": "application/json",
"x-csrf-token": "dc1330c72bc005585f79e79110a39318355d5ce1b7134f2bd93412b1deaf494d",
"x-requested-with": "XMLHttpRequest"
},
"baseURL": "/cors_api/v1",
"method": "post",
"url": "",
"data": "{\"headers\":{\"accept\":\"application/json, text/plain, */*\"},\"url\":\"https://orgfarm-66f4572e77-dev-ed.my.salesforce.com/services/data/v60.0/query?q=SELECT%20Name%2C%20D...",\"method\":\"get\"}",
"allowAbsoluteUrls": true
},
"code": "ERR_BAD_RESPONSE",
"status": 500
}

entry.title: Re: 403 error , CAP BTP (Node), SAP Job Scheduling servic...
entry.content: Did you grant authorization to Job scheduling service in your mta? This is needed for the job scheduling API to call your API

entry.title: Cross model copy from old model (Account base) to New Model (Measure base) in SAC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Context:

We are trying to achieve copy the data from Account based model to Measure base through link function but  are facing some glitch in code.

Issue:

Code:

The below code is written to served the purpose but it is copying the Default currency data of old model to Local currency of new model. Moreover i don't see where the linkage for the measure can be given as source model doesn't have measure.

Request you to please provide your expert comments on the same.

 

**

MEMBERSET [d/Accounts] = BASEMEMBER([d/Accounts], "Rate", "Quantity", "Input",)

MODEL [Model_Old]

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = BASEMEMBER([d/Date], %DateN%)

MEMBERSET [d/Accounts] = BASEMEMBER([d/Accounts], "Rate", "Quantity", "Input",)

    ENDMODEL

DATA(

 [d/Accounts] = [Model_Old].[d/Accounts],

 [d/Date] = [Model_Old].[d/Date])

= LINK([Model_Old], [d/Version] = %SourceVersion%)

****

 

 

Regards,

entry.title: MS Office's "Monthly Enterprise Channel" compatibility with SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
entry.content:
Hi , 

We currently run our MS Office apps clients on the Semi-Annual Enterprise release to ensure that builds only get new features twice per year and only security fixes the other months to minimize potential impact.

However , we would want to understand the impact of MS Office's "Monthly Enterprise channel" on the SAP Analytics Cloud , that upgrades quarterly by SAP. 

Please let me know , if the "Monthly Enterprise Channel" release of MS Office willbe compatible for SAC add in for MS Office , or is it not recommended. ?

Thanks in Advance for all your inputs. 

Anita Sonthalia

 

Kindly share the latest recommendations with respect to the above.

entry.title: Hello how to create Tip Message guidance for employee for required attachment in dependent page
entry.content:
My Client have requirement to add Tip Message on Dependent page to advise them what are the required documents to be attached like birth certificate or marriage certificate

How can i achieve this requirement

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: ORA-1017 from powershell script only
entry.content:
When you are logging on with SQLPLUS, you use the OPS$ connection method. With the POWERSHELL script, you are using username/password combination.

Please check these SAP notes:

  • 3262491 - R3trans -d failed with Connecting as SYSTEM - Netweaver
  • 3110012 - R3trans returns error ORA-01017 - Netweaver
  • 2939522 - Installation fails while testing connection to the database

entry.title: Re: BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE is not updating the Net Price in...
entry.content:
It seems that either the RM06ENP0 report still needs to be run, or the contract still needs to be manually modified using ME32K. 🤔

  • Contract item price is not changed when changing a condition valid for a future period 
  • 685117 - Net Price in Info Record or Contract is wrong

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
Hello @Max_Gander ,

a simple use case:

If I have a third party ETL tool, and I have created a local table from Datasphere UI,

I can not write to that table with an external ETL tool (SAP or non SAP).

As the table is in a DB schema managed by the application (Datasphere) and related to a Space. (the schema has the same name of the Space technical name).

This is probably done to guarantee Audit of operations made in Datasphere UI, and this is a boomeerang in the difficulty of integration between SAC and Datasphere, we can see that this is happening as SAC seamless planning is writing on an OpenSQL Schema instead of a Datasphere Space schema.
the point is Datasphere is an application build on top of a HANA Cloud database, the database is locked and managed by the application => not open to every use case.

entry.title: Enter a G/L accountMessage no. M8054
entry.content: We are getting the Enter a G/L account message no. M8054 error while posting the purchasing  invoice in the Mr44, it specifically occurs in the account assignment category A, K, F. If we post in the MIRO document was posting.

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hi,

I am Prasanna, an SAP CPI Consultant with 2.8 years of experience in the SAP Cloud Platform Integration(CPI) Module. I'm passionate about exploring new topics in the integration space and continuously expanding my knowledge. Through this blog space, i aim to share practical insights, real-time scenarios, and learnings from my experience to help others in the SAP community and also to learn more from the other SAP Bloggers as well.

Thanks & Regards
Prasanna Samanthakurthi

entry.title: Re: SAP BI Launchpad Load Balancer URL not working in Mic...
entry.content:
Please check if your Microsoft Edge is configured to open the URL on " Internet Explorer Mode":

https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-edge/internet-explorer-mode-in-microsoft-edge-6604162f-e38a-48b2-acd2-682dbac6f0de

entry.title: Re: Handle persons leaving the organisation when provisio...
entry.content:
Hi Yogananda,

 

How I now set it up:
Source entra - target IAS. Read users and groups relevant for S4

Source IAS - target S/4 rfc . Read users and assign roles. Selection is done on membership of IAS group s4s_qas. If part of this group, user is created and assigned IAS groups are assigned as roles in S/4. Set ips.delete.existedbefore.entities to false, so accounts dont get deleted in S/4. 

 

What I want:

1. If user is removed from IAS group s4s_qas the user should get locked in S/4 and assigned the SU01 usergroup "inactive". 

2. If user is locked in EntraID, user needs to be locked in IAS and S/4

3. If user is added to IAS group s4s_qas again, users has to be unlocked in S/4

 

Number 2 works. 

Number 1 and 3 do not work. Can this be achieved with transformations?

 

Thanks

Sander

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi,

I am Prasanna, an SAP CPI Consultant with 2.8 years of experience in the SAP Cloud Platform Integration(CPI) Module. I'm passionate about exploring new topics in the integration space and continuously expanding my knowledge. Through this blog space, i aim to share practical insights, real-time scenarios, and learnings from my experience to help others in the SAP community and also to learn more from the other SAP Bloggers as well.

Thanks & Regards
Prasanna Samanthakurthi

entry.title: Re: Auto-insert AR-Invoice data to linked server SQL tabl...
entry.content:
Hi DINESH_SELVAN_WORKGLOW,

The use of advanced database objects such as triggers in the SAP Business One databases are not allowed.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: My new UDO does not appear in UDO's list in a UDF with Link to UDO Validation
entry.content:
Hi araob,

You can create an incident so that we can check it further.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Welcome @Prasanna_Samanthakurthi7 - hope you enjoy SAP Community - I believe you have already grasped how this space can help you and how you in turn can help others with your insights! Take a look at our location groups as well and see if there is already one that you could join in your region.
https://community.sap.com/t5/location-groups/ct-p/location

entry.title: Re: Express document "Update was terminated" for BAPI BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2
entry.content:
option 1:- As you know, the records from file for which the BAPI_PO_CHANGE didnt process, you can collect those fallouts in internal table and at the end of current code logic you can check if the reprocess internal table is not initial, you can call the BAPI_PO_CHANGE again, like recursive untill all the file records had gone thru BAPI_PO_CHANGE. You can use counter, total file records against total records triggered BAPI_PO_CHANGE.

Option 2:- You can use the asynchronous RFC technique, receiving results routine will have BAPI return tables data for every file record triggered BAPI_PO_CHANGE.

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw74/7.4.16/en-us/48/9bdeec0c1c73e7e10000000a42189b/frameset.htm

entry.title: Re: Auto Goods Issue in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content: It seems you checked only the very 1st entry, which is about manually setting backflush indicator via XSLT as an extension. Check the other entries! Backflush integration and posting should be supported ootb in DM if properly configured in ERP. Br, Manoel

entry.title: Edit Time Valuation Result
entry.content:
Hello @Volker_Ruof , 

As a Time Sheet approver, is it possible to edit Time Valuation Results?

We have a specific requirement from a client that wants to approve some of the overtime recorded but not necessarily all of it. The problem is that the overtime is integrated and not manually created.

The time valuation results are correctly generated but it is up to the approver to accept or not accept those time valuation results - so they analyze eache particular case.

Is it possible to create a specific workflow for these time valuations? Or even allow the manager to delete some of these in the workflow page?

Thank you

entry.title: How can I know the usage statistics of IQ NLS system?
entry.content:
How can the customer know the usage statistics of IQ NLS system?
They want to know how many times NLS system was hit by any BW query in last 12 months & possible also want to know which BW query was involved?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How can I know the usage statistics of IQ NLS system?
entry.content:
** On SAP IQ side
- How to monitor user transactions and versioning 
https://me.sap.com/notes/0003286487 

See also Example in SAP Notes:
- How to Use Auditing in SAP IQ 16 
https://me.sap.com/notes/2137269

entry.title: Re: Cross model copy from old model (Account base) to New...
entry.content:
Hi @9160ruby 

When cross-model copy from the Account model to the Measure model, the default currency value is copied. There is no way to copy from the "Local currency value" of the Account model to the Measure model. 

The workaround solution is to convert from the default currency value to the Local currency on the measure model. 

  • Create one more Measreu with the Default currency. (ex, USD)
  • Copy from the account model default value to the measure "USD".

    • DATA([d/Measures] = "USD", [d/Accounts] = [Model_Old].[d/Accounts], [d/Date] = [Model_Old].[d/Date])
      = LINK([Model_Old], [d/Version] = %SourceVersion%)

  • Currency conversion from "USD" measure to "LC" measure on the Measure model.  

 

I hope this is helpful to you, and if I have misunderstood anything, please feel free to reach out.

Moonjun

entry.title: While using change tank dip option, customer fields (CUST1, CUST2) are not populated in o4_TIGER
entry.content:
While using change tank dip option, customer fields (CUST1, CUST2) are not populated in o4_TIGER. these fields are populated while creating Tank dip.
the structure ROITANKDIP has these fields however there is no corresponding table that stores these fields

entry.title: Re: Extend CDS Collective Value Help
entry.content: Did you ever find a solution for this?

entry.title: Re: Non Standard Allocation in SAC
entry.content:
I don't know why your product 40 is not in the output, but this could be the code for the allocation to work

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "Amount"

AGGREGATE_DIMENSIONS = [d/COMPCODE], [d/ACCOUNT], [d/COSTCENTER], [d/ITEM_CODE]
AGGREGATE_WRITETO [d/COMPCODE] = "CC01"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO [d/ACCOUNT] = "AAC5"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO [d/COSTCENTER] = "COSTC1"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO [d/ITEM_CODE] = "SL1000"

VARIABLEMEMBER #TOTAL OF [d/AUDITTRAIL]
DATA([d/AUDITTRAIL] = #TOTAL, [d/COLLECTION] = "#", [d/COUNTRY] = "#", [d/BRAND] = "#", [d/GENDER] = "#", [d/PRODUCT] = "#") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/AUDITTRAIL] = "DT02") 

DATA([d/AUDITTRAIL] = "DT03") = (RESULTLOOKUP([d/AUDITTRAIL] = "DT02") / RESULTLOOKUP([d/AUDITTRAIL] = #TOTAL, [d/COLLECTION] = "#", [d/COUNTRY] = "#", [d/BRAND] = "#", [d/GENDER] = "#", [d/PRODUCT] = "#")) * RESULTLOOKUP([d/AUDITTRAIL] = "DT01", [d/COLLECTION] = "#", [d/COUNTRY] = "#", [d/BRAND] = "#", [d/GENDER] = "#", [d/PRODUCT] = "#")

entry.title: Re: Two Major News with SUM 2.0 SP 17
entry.content:
Hi Boris.

We are going to migrate our ECC 6 system running on HANA DB to S/4 HANA 2023 on RISE .

Because of network limitation the scenario is DMO with System Move .

Where the Shadow instance should be created? At  the target HANA DB in SAP Cloud  or at original one?

Thank you.

Regards

Vladimir Kogan

entry.title: Data Definition for Functional Location Master Data
entry.content:
Hi, I am creating a data definition document for Functional Location Master data to identify fields which are required to populate the data as part of migration from ECC to S/4 HANA. I need support on below queries:

1. How to identify total number of tables applicable for functional location

2. How to identify which tables and which fields in those tables feed data to Functional Location T-code IL01

3. Mapping of the tables 

4. Out of those fields which one are mandatory, optional and display

5. Which of these fields need configuration and which do not. 

Is there a way or T-code apart from SE16N which I can leverage for these tasks. Please share any SAP links or best practices on data mapping documen from ECC to S4 HANA for master data elements.

entry.title: Re: 403 error , CAP BTP (Node), SAP Job Scheduling servic...
entry.content:
Hi Swetha,

Yes , as : 

"grant-as-authority-to-apps": ["$XSSERVICENAME(xyz-job-scheduler)"]

entry.title: Re: Cross model copy from old model (Account base) to New...
entry.content: Hi @MoonJun, so there is not a single solution provided for the migration client by SAP to allow them to move the data from old model to new model than file upload.

entry.title: Re: How to check if customer invoice is paid in ByD via O...
entry.content: Hello, 1.I am able to retrieve data with or without BYD_P_CURDATE filter. 2.It is the same ID value as you select in Report view selection Company. Your query seems no problem. Just double check the filter value, comparing with the Report vaules in the system.

entry.title: Re: Not able to run MDK application through run as local...
entry.content:
Hi @bill_froelich ,

Sorry for the late reply, Yes we have selected BTP destination and we are getting the list of entity sets but still having the similar issue.

entry.title: Re: Help with NoClassDefFoundError for com/sap/aii/securi...
entry.content: @CCSAPCEPSA that's doesn't sound normal. Inside com.sap.aii.af.svc.facade folder you should see three jar files 1) com.sap.aii.af.cpa.svc.filter.jar 2) com.sap.aii.af.svc.facade.jar 3) com.sap.aii.af.svc.filter.jar. #3 is the library you need for SAPSecurityResources.

entry.title: Re: Help with NoClassDefFoundError for com/sap/aii/securi...
entry.content: @CCSAPCEPSA you can also try adding the XPI Library using Build Path in NWDS. See if that imports the necessary libraries.

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba 2411 Release Key Innovations Preview
entry.content:
@Bertaus I would like to get more information on Spend Control Tower like

why its recommended to go for SCT when we have Ariba Spend Analysis.

Also, we have SAP Analytics cloud coming which have a broader way of looking at things but still we have SCT in place.

Also, How do we licensing done for SCT as its not available on in SAP Partner Pricing App

Looking forward to your response

entry.title: Re: Selective Data Transfer to SAP Cloud ALM: Why It Matters and How to Approach It
entry.content: Thank you Jamie 🙂

entry.title: Automatically export / save update errors and short dumps
entry.content:
Hi,

As auditors keep an eye on missing document numbers, we have to explain these.

We found out they often come from update errors in SM13 (with corresponding short dumps in ST22).

For documentation and analysis we need to be able to access these historically.
As short dumps are reorganized regularly and update errors should be deleted before updates we need another solution.

Is there a way to automatically export update errors and (corresponding) short dumps?

Thank you for feedback & Best regards,

Jonas

entry.title: Re: Connect with SAP Community at SAP Sapphire and Share Your Special SAP Event Moment!
entry.content:
Nice thread @moshenaveh and good to have such a collection of blog posts.

I'm sure many of our SAP Champions have some fab photos from recent events that they wouldn't mind sharing! Not mentioning any names 😀 @smarchesini @walid @Marssel700 @MRobalinho (bearing in mind that the Brazil contingency also bring music to their event!! Wow!).

Here's a little collage from ASUG Tech Connect, Orlando - Nov 2024 - when SAP TechEd went on tour. Putting the obvious technical piece aside, what I loved most about the event was getting to meet colleagues, SAP Community Leaders, and community members in person. Having that chance to network and make your circle a little bigger. In addition, meeting the "real" people that you speak with so often virtually. It's all about the people (and sometimes kitty cats) 😀.

@StephanieMarley @Sandra_Solis @LeonardoAraujo @smarchesini @SergioG_TX

entry.title: About DMS repository configuration on newly migrated S4Hana
entry.content:
Dear SAP India,

We have recently migrated our ECC server with SAP S/4HANA 2022. Now we needs to configure DMS Repository with newly migrated SAP S/4HANA 2022 server from our old ECC server to S4Hana server.

entry.title: Data migration Practice systems
entry.content:
Hello,

 Can you help please,

 In which SAP Learning System Access i can find the app below to practice migration cockpit ?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Delete Employee From SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi @salimo 

 

To purge users on SuccessFactors you need to proceed with some actions before, including make inactive this employees.

I think that for your case you need to proceed with deletion of all Compensation and VarPay worksheets linked to this users.

The link below can help you to delete this users: Overview of all Data Purge options and Compensatio... - SAP Community

 

Hope that I could helped you with your issue!

JC

entry.title: Re: Where can I find learning materials for SAP CPQ concepts, features, and functionality.
entry.content:
Hi @chakrad71 
Regarding the SAP CPQ training.
Thanks for posting this to our the  Q&A area for new questions
This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction exception in ServiceLayer
entry.content:
We have the same error build, while we try to add user defined tables. This is our payload:

{
"TableName":"<some table name>",
"TableDescription":"<some table description>",
"TableType":"bott_NoObjectAutoIncrement",
"Archivable":"tNO",
"ArchiveDateField":null,
"DisplayMenu":"tYES",
"ApplyAuthorization":"tNO"
}

The first 1 - 5 trials was successful, but now we only become the error message from service layer:
-1116 / Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction

We have restarted the service layer service with the SAP Business One Service Layer Controller, but it does not help.

Our system:
SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.280) FP 2502 (64-bit)

Update:
I think it's the table name or the description, because if I use other values for the fields, it works.

When I try to add the table via the SAP client, I get the following error message:
Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction 'Dynamic authorization' (CDPM)

entry.title: Re: 🚀 Enquanto ainda não temos eventos locais, seguimos conectados ao SAP Business Campus em SP!
entry.content: Excelente! O Brazil a crescer na comunidade SAP!

entry.title: CAP application not working with HANA Cloud DB after deployment
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a very simple CAP project in BAS with HANA Cloud DB and Fiori Elements with OData v4 (without any service implementation or extensions). I deployed this project on client's BTP subaccount CF space without any errors, but when I click on Create button in Fiori Elements UI, I receive 500 error and the OData service log shows below error:

argument type mismatch: not supported path expression: must be json list for array index access\n-> $[\"DraftUUID\"]\n-> ^\n 

In my understanding, CAP service is not able to create a Draft row in HANA DB when UI sends a POST call with empty object as payload (standard fiori elements stuff).

However, when I downloaded the codebase from client's BAS, imported in my trial account and deployed, it works as it should. The draft gets created successfully in trial account and I see the Object page in create mode. I compared the tables and views created in the HDI container and those are exactly the same.

On client's stack, I have undeployed and deployed this app several times and nothing works. 

 

Can you please help in fixing this issue?

Here is the package.json file:

{
  "name": "papm-poc2",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "A simple CAP project.",
  "repository": "<Add your repository here>",
  "license": "UNLICENSED",
  "private": true,
  "dependencies": {
    "@sap/cds": "^8.7.2",
    "express": "^4",
    "@sap/xssec": "^4.4.0",
    "@cap-js/hana": "^1.6.1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@cap-js/cds-types": "^0.9.0",
    "@cap-js/sqlite": "^1",
    "@sap/cds-dk": "^8.7.2",
    "rimraf": "^5.0.5",
    "mbt": "^1.2.29"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "cds-serve",
    "watch-papmpoc2costpool": "cds watch --open papmpoc2costpool/webapp/index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false",
    "undeploy": "cf undeploy papm-poc2 --delete-services --delete-service-keys --delete-service-brokers",
    "build": "rimraf resources mta_archives && mbt build --mtar archive",
    "deploy": "cf deploy mta_archives/archive.mtar --retries 1"
  },
  "cds": {
    "requires": {
      "connectivity": true,
      "destinations": true,
      "html5-runtime": true,
      "[production]": {
        "db": "hana",
        "auth": "xsuaa"
      }
    },
    "sql": {
      "native_hana_associations": false
    }
  },
  "sapux": [
    "app/papmpoc2costpool"
  ]
}

Here is the mta.yaml file:

_schema-version: 3.3.0
ID: papm-poc2
description: A simple CAP project.
version: 1.0.0
modules:
  - name: papm-poc2-srv
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/srv
    requires:
      - name: papm-poc2-db
      - name: papm-poc2-connectivity
      - name: papm-poc2-destination
      - name: papm-poc2-auth
    provides:
      - name: srv-api
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      instances: 1
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm-ci
  - name: papm-poc2-db-deployer
    type: hdb
    path: gen/db
    requires:
      - name: papm-poc2-db
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
  - name: papm-poc2-destinations-deployer
    type: com.sap.application.content
    requires:
      - name: srv-api
      - name: papm-poc2-srv
      - name: papm-poc2-destination
        parameters:
          content-target: true
      - name: papm-poc2-html5-repo-host
        parameters:
          service-key:
            name: papm-poc2-repo-host-key
      - name: papm-poc2-auth
        parameters:
          service-key:
            name: papm-poc2-auth-key
    parameters:
      content:
        instance:
          destinations:
            # - Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
            #   HTML5.Timeout: 180000
            #   Name: papm-poc2-srv
            #   TokenServiceInstanceName: papm-poc2-auth
            #   TokenServiceKeyName: papm-poc2-auth-key
            #   URL: ~{srv-api/srv-url}
            - Name: papm-poc2-repo-host
              ServiceInstanceName: papm-poc2-html5-service
              ServiceKeyName: papm-poc2-repo-host-key
              sap.cloud.service: com.client.ra.poc2
            - Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
              Name: papm-poc2-auth
              ServiceInstanceName: papm-poc2-auth
              ServiceKeyName: papm-poc2-auth-key
              sap.cloud.service: com.client.ra.poc2
          existing_destinations_policy: update
    build-parameters:
      no-source: true
  - name: papm-poc2-app-deployer
    type: com.sap.application.content
    path: .
    requires:
      - name: papm-poc2-html5-repo-host
        parameters:
          content-target: true
    build-parameters:
      build-result: resources
      requires:
        - artifacts:
            - comclientrapapmpoc2costpool.zip
          name: comclientrapapmpoc2costpool
          target-path: resources/
  - name: comclientrapapmpoc2costpool
    type: html5
    path: app/papmpoc2costpool
    build-parameters:
      build-result: dist
      builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm install
        - npm run build:cf
      supported-platforms: []
resources:
  - name: papm-poc2-auth
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      config:
        tenant-mode: dedicated
        xsappname: papm-poc2-${org}-${space}
      path: ./xs-security.json
      service: xsuaa
      service-plan: application
  - name: papm-poc2-db
    type: com.sap.xs.hdi-container
    parameters:
      service: hana
      service-plan: hdi-shared
  - name: papm-poc2-connectivity
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: connectivity
      service-plan: lite
  - name: papm-poc2-destination
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      config:
        HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
        init_data:
          instance:
            destinations:
              - Authentication: NoAuthentication
                HTML5.DynamicDestination: true
                HTML5.ForwardAuthToken: true
                Name: papm-poc2-srv-api
                ProxyType: Internet
                Type: HTTP
                URL: ~{srv-api/srv-url}
              - Authentication: NoAuthentication
                Name: ui5
                ProxyType: Internet
                Type: HTTP
                URL: https://ui5.sap.com
            existing_destinations_policy: update
      service: destination
      service-plan: lite
    requires:
      - name: srv-api
  - name: papm-poc2-html5-repo-host
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: html5-apps-repo
      service-name: papm-poc2-html5-service
      service-plan: app-host
parameters:
  deploy_mode: html5-repo
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
build-parameters:
  before-all:
    - builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - npx cds build --production

Br, Ekansh

SAP HANA Cloud SAP Cloud Application Programming Model SAP Fiori Elements

entry.title: Integrating SAC Private Cloud into BDC
entry.content:
Hi,

How should we manage the integration of SAC Private Cloud tenants into BDC? Is this possible, or would we need to migrate SAC from a private to a public cloud? If migration is necessary, will it be transparent for the customer, or will we need to move content from one tenant to another?

entry.title: Re: ME32K/ME31K - Badi/ User exit
entry.content: EXIT_SAPMM06E_018 is used to update the custom item fields.

entry.title: Exception Messages in S/4HANA Public Cloud - MRP
entry.content: Hey, we would like to see exception notifications, in this case, rescheduling exceptions for delivery schedules. TheApp  "Schedule MRP Rescheduling Checks" is unfortunately only available for purchase orders. However, we need this for Delivery Schedule Segmentations. Unfortunately, the “MRP Situations” app only displays the exception message “Cancel delivery” and not the exception message 10 or 15. Is it possible to view these exception messages centrally in the public cloud?

entry.title: Re: Custom Field on MM17 is not editable
entry.content: What's the maximum length of the field, that works as editable?

entry.title: How to Prepare for the SAP BTP Solution Architect Certification (with Sample Questions)
entry.content:
In this blog, I’ll share practical tips to help you to prepare and be able to pass the SAP BTP Solution Architect certification (P_BTPA_2408). While the post is especially helpful for those aiming to get certified, it also provides useful insights for SAP developers, architects, project managers, and anyone daily involved in SAP BTP projects or operations.

Being a successful SAP Solution Architect or Enterprise Architect requires a deep understanding of both on-premises and hyperscaler technologies, combined with hands-on experience from real customer projects. On top of that, strong expertise in SAP solutions is essential. Earning the SAP Solution Architect certification is just the beginning of this journey.

In this blog series, I’ll share practical insights to help you prepare and succeed to achieve this goal.

Exam Topics and Focus Areas

To pass the certification you’ll need a score of 68% or higher, SAP outlines the following key areas:

  • Understanding the Intelligent Enterprise and SAP’s reference architecture
  • Familiarity with SAP BTP services, account models, capabilities (including AI), suite qualities, extensibility types, clean core, and migration strategies (greenfield, brownfield)
  • SAP Methodologies: Integration Solution Advisory Methodology (ISA-M), Application Extension Methodology, and Data & Analytics Methodology
  • Identity and access management types, CAP (Cloud Application Programming Model), RAP (ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model), and runtime environments
  • DevOps principles, SAP BTP commercial models, and master data replication
  • Recommending solution designs based on requirements and compliance

Key Areas of Study

To gain the knowledge required, focus on the following areas:

  • Enterprise Architect vs. Solution Architect roles
  • SAP BTP Framework and Reference Architectures
  • SAP Discovery Centre, Business Accelerator Hub, and Trust Centre
  • SAP BTP account model (global accounts, directories, subaccounts)
  • BTP Identity and Access Management (IAM)
  • BTP Connectivity and SAP Cloud Connector
  • S/4HANA implementation types: Greenfield, Brownfield, Bluefield
  • Application development frameworks and extensibility
  • Clean Core principles and extensibility models
  • SAP BTP Data and Analytics (SAP Datasphere, SAP Analytics Cloud)
  • SAP Business Data Cloud
  • SAP Data and Analytics advisory Methodology
  • SAP Integration Solution Advisory Methodology (ISA-M)
  • SAP Integration solution Capabilities and Services
  • SAP Build Process Automation, and Signavio
  • SAP AI tools like Joule, and Generative AI Hub
  • SAP BTP Commercial Models and BTP estimating costs

Deep Dive: ISA-M in Practice

ISA-M is central to BTP solution architecture and used throughout the integration lifecycle:

  • Phase 1: Assess your integration strategy (e.g., cloud-to-cloud, on-premise-to-cloud)
  • Phase 2: Design the hybrid integration platform by mapping use case patterns to technology
  • Phase 3: Define best practices, blueprints, and guidelines
  • Phase 4: Establish organizational and operational models for enterprise integration

If you study the Learning Hub courses listed below, you'll gain the core knowledge needed for this exam.
For deeper insight into areas you may not work with daily, make sure to check out the advanced learning links shared below as well.
The exam time is fair, and by practicing with BTP trial environments or your organization’s non-production BTP landscape, you’ll be well prepared to pass the exam.

Recommended (Free) Learning Resources

  • Becoming an SAP BTP Solution Architect (main course)
  • Discovering SAP Business Technology Platform
  • Delta Content for BTP Solution Architect

Important Reference Links

  • Integration Architecture Guide (ISA-M)
    NoteBookLM Audio Dialog
  • Integration Solution Advisory Methodology PDF Guide
    NoteBookLM Audio Dialog
  • SAP BTP Guideline Framework
  • SAP Application Extension Methodology
  • ISA-M Presentation (PDF)
  • Extension Architecture Guide
  • SAP Data & Analytics Advisory Methodology Overview

Advanced Learning and Practice

  • Administering SAP BTP
  • Create a BTP Trial Account
  • SAP Trust Centre (Security and Compliance)
  • BTP Account Model & Entitlements
  • SAP BTP Admin Guide
  • OpenSAP Video: ISA-M Integration Assessment
  • Integration Suite Assessment Tool
  • Migration Assessment App
  • Setting up SAP Mobile Start with SAP S/4HANA on SAP Build Work Zone
  • Clean Core Three-Tier Extensibility
  • SAP Discovery Centre:  Reference Architectures & Estimators
  • Cost Estimator
  • Cloud Integration Automation Service User Guide

I've put together 15 sample questions to help you prepare for the exam. These questions are a bit more challenging than the ones you'll typically see on the actual test.

1. Which statement is true about SAP trail account in BTP?
a. A BTP trial account includes only 6 GB of memory for applications
b. You are able to move your Proof of Concept from BTP trail to Pay-As-You-Go account
c. A trial account will be removed when a user not logged on after 90 days
d. You need to manually restart of your solution like HANA DB every day

2. Which SAP licensing model In SAP BTP supports: "The total monthly cost would be deducted from the cloud credits balance monthly"?
a. SAP BTPEA
b. Pay-As-You-Go for SAP BTP
c. Subscription
d. SAP Full User Equivalent (FUE)

3. In which level of BTP account you can add or modify your Identity Authentication Service was assigned?
a. Global account
b. Subaccount
c. Directory
d. All answers above

4. In SAP Road Map, SAP decided to have the traditional Early Watch Report in which solutions or platform?
a. SAP Solution Manager
b. SAP Cloud ALM
c. SAP Early Watch alert Workspace
d. DVM in SAP For Me launchpad

5. According to the SAP Integration Solution Advisory Methodology, the Enterprise Architect is responsible for which of the following activities?
a. Definition of integration standards and technology selection guidelines (cross-vendor, hybrid integration platform)
b. Definition of technical integration architectures with a focus on specific integration technologies
c. Definition and communication of patterns, templates, and best practices
d. All of above
Reference: page 51
Link   page 51
6. A customer has BOBJ and BODS in their existing SAP on premises landscape, when they are going to migrate to S/4 HANA private edition which solution they can pick to support a similar functionality? Make sure the solution is aligned with SAP latest future road map.
a. HANA Cloud, Datasphere
b. SAP Analytic Cloud (SAC), SAP S/4 HANA
c. SAP Intelligent Suite, SAP BW cloud
d. SAP Analytic Cloud (SAC), Datasphere

7. Which statement about SAP Clean Core concept is NOT correct?
a. Deploying a new custom code cannot be on core system (by stack).
b. The clean core strategy advocates for separating custom extensions from the core SAP application.
c. Use "Key User Extensibility" functions of S/4HANA for simple extensions.
d. In classic Extensibility: Applicable primarily to on-premises editions, this tier includes traditional customization methods.

8. Your company has S/4 HANA provisioned in National Security Services (NS2) in Azure, for the entry point of external users you as Solution Architect recommending BTP work Zone as an option.
Which answer meets the requirements (as a cost-effective option) for number 1, 2 descriptions in the diagram below:

a. SAP Build Work Zone advanced edition, SAP Connectivity Service
b. SAP Build Work Zone standard edition, SAP Connectivity Service
c. SAP Build Work Zone advanced edition, Cloud Connector
d. SAP Build Work Zone standard edition, Cloud Connector

9. You are acting as a Solution Architect guiding a migration team that is transitioning from an on-premises SAP PI/PO system to the SAP BTP Integration Suite.
Which of the following tools or services should you recommend to the team, in their appropriate sequence, to support this migration effectively?
a.
SAP BTP Migration Assessment
SAP BTP Integration Assessment
SAP Readiness Check
b.
SAP Readiness Check
SAP BTP Migration Assessment
SAP BTP Integration Assessment
c.
SAP Readiness Check
SAP BTP Integration Assessment
SAP BTP Migration Assessment
d.
SAP BTP Integration Assessment
SAP Readiness Check
SAP BTP Migration Assessment

10. Which of the following SAP BTP services are required or typically used by SAP Cloud ALM?
Select all correct answers (3):
a. SAP Alert Notification Service
b. SAP Automation Pilot
c. SAP Cloud Transport Management
d. SAP Build Work Zone
e. SAP Analytic Cloud
f. SAP Conversational AI

11. Which service can provide a rough rate cost for any service you are going to purchase for BTP solution:
a. SAP For Me Legal & cost
b. SAP Cloud estimator
c. SAP BTP Service Catalog
d. SAP BTP Service Estimator

12. A customer is planning to implement Change Request Management (ChaRM) in the cloud after migrating to SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition on a hyperscaler (e.g., Azure).
Which two main tools or technologies can they use to manage change and transport processes in this cloud-based environment?
a. SAP Solution Manager, CTS
b. Cloud Transport Management System (cTMS), SAP Cloud ALM
c. SAP BTP Cloud Foundry, SAP Cloud ALM
d. SAP Solution Manager, Cloud Transport Management System (cTMS)

13. During the Explore phase of an SAP S/4HANA implementation using SAP Activate methodology, a customer aims to validate fit-to-standard processes and ensure alignment with future-state operations.
They also want to establish a monitoring and task management structure early to prepare for efficient project execution and operations.
Which of the following combinations of tools and capabilities are best aligned to support these objectives? (Choose two.)
a. SAP Signavio Process Insights – to compare legacy KPIs against SAP standard benchmarks and identify transformation opportunities
b. SAP Cloud ALM – to import and manage business process models, simulate variants, and execute fit-to-standard workshops
c. SAP Signavio Process Manager – to model target processes and support fit-to-standard workshops using process content from SAP Best Practices
d. SAP Cloud ALM – to orchestrate project tasks, manage requirements, and support test case management from the Explore phase onward
e. SAP Solution Manager – to configure business roles and monitor production incidents during the Explore phase

14. In the context of SAP Event Mesh and SAP BTP, which of the following are required to establish secure communication between publishers and subscribers? (Choose two)
a. XSUAA service for OAuth authentication
b. Connectivity service with destination type = HTTP
c. Application router for handling protocol mapping
d. Event Mesh instance bound to each application with service keys
e. Transport Layer Security (TLS) tunnelling via Cloud Connector

15. What are benefits of using the Cloud Foundry environment in SAP BTP for event-driven extensions? (Choose two)
a. Native ABAP integration without additional runtimes
b. Horizontal scalability for stateless microservices
c. Event handling with built-in webhook configuration
d. Support for event consumers written in various languages (e.g., Node.js, Java)
e. Built-in support for SAP GUI transactions

Answer Keys:
1-Answer: d; 2.Answer: a; 3.Answer: b; 4.Answer: d; 5.Answer: a; 6.Answer: d; 7.Answer: a;
8.Answer: d;9.Answer: b; 10.Answer: a, b, c; 11.Answer: d; 12.Answer: b; 13.Answer: c, d; 14.Answer: a, d;
15.Answer: b, d

To purchase exam attempts if you don’t have SAP Learning Hub license, you can check the link below:            
https://training.sap.com/content/purchase-certification-attempts

Schedule exam for BTP Solution Architect(P_BTPA_2408)

Share with others and Connect with us!

Please leave your comment if you have anything to add!
If you would like to ask questions, please use the community Q&A.
Give us a like and share on social media if you feel it was useful!
You can follow me in People SAP @Amin_Omidy 
Thanks!

entry.title: taxReclaimCode is required for domestic taxes
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We get this error message when trying to post an expense report via Concur.

taxReclaimCode is required for domestic taxes

What could be the problem? FYI: The G/L account is not tax-relevant.

Best regards,

Gabor

entry.title: Re: The problems with SAP for ME portal
entry.content: Hello, have those issues mentioned above been resolved (search for specific customer case not possible, limited filter criteria)? It seems not, I am facing the same issues.

entry.title: Me22n IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS
entry.content:
Hello , 

After I add a new item in an existing PO (ME22n) and i save message edi the FM IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS is not triggered. When I  create PO in me21n i do not have that issue, spter i save edi message i get always in IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS. 

Do you know how i can get to IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS after adding new item in po, or let me know if there is another exit where i can do some changes after saving edi mesage in me22n.

Thank you

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model: 3 Things You Need to Know About the Update in Email Notifications
entry.content:
Hello SAP community members!

This article is intended as a newsletter for all our SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Standard Model (SAP PaPM Cloud SM) users, providing you with the three important information you need to know on the most recent change to email notification services.

Without further ado, let’s get started!

1. What are the updates in email notifications?

  • Email sender – instead of PAPM@sap.com the sender will now be papm@notifications.sap.com
  • Email contents – an update to the email content which will provide a clearer and more user-readable text.

See examples below:

Subscribing or unsubscribing from email notifications:

Activity Status Report (Open, Completed, Rejected, and Approved)

2. What does this update mean to our SAP PaPM Cloud SM solution?

To align with SAP's email handling capabilities, we are now transitioning from the using the current SAP SMTP service to a new solution, ANS (Alert Notification Service).

This change will automatically be applied in your SAP PaPM Cloud SM solution; however, it is important to take note that there are certain regions which will not be supported with this transition due to the absence of a built-in Simple Mail Transfer Protocol (SMTP) service.

See Notification Settings help portal for the list of regions.

BUT DO NOT WORRY!

💡 Important: If your tenant is residing in these regions and would need to have an email notification service enabled, simply proceed to number 3.

3. How will I enable email notifications in my tenant if my region is not supported with this update?

For SAP PaPM Cloud SM tenants that are residing in regions that are not supported with this update, you may enable your email notifications by following the steps below:

  • Create Mail Destination in SAP BTP
  • Configure Destination in Standard Model

Did you know that you can still use your own email notification service instead of the default one provided by SAP PaPM Cloud SM? You can configure your own email notification service, which will take priority over the built-in service.

After enabling the email destination in BTP and in Standard Model application, the email sender will remain as, PAPM@sap.com but the email content will be the same. That easy!

I hope this blogpost provided you with enough information that you need to know about the latest email notification changes in SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model.

Thank you for reading!

entry.title: Re: How to send control recipe to CPI (Cloud Platform Int...
entry.content: @MySAPuser2002typically folks would send it directly to an MES which is how it would be configured instead of trying to force it through CPI where it's clearly not supported, but that would be if people made the smart choice about not modifying the system.

entry.title: Re: Free Form Payments Process in SAP
entry.content:
Hello Abha,

I believe you have question to following documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/031c345485b84c8c94265be9ef61d3a8/a0dc70f8489b444886961046bf04b106.html?q=process%20free%20form%20payments&locale=en-US.

There is the My Free Form Payments and Process Free Form Payments app. You can create, post, reverse and release 3 types of payment requests:
Free Form Payments,
Payments for Costumers,
Payments for Suppliers.

When creating the Free Form Payments, you can use Payee's IBAN or bank details (country, bank, account) or bank alias. 

Payments are allowed for all currencies (only Swiss QR-Bills are supported in CHF and EUR).

One-time customers/suppliers are supported.

The Automatic Payment Program is part of the process it is called when you Release the payment request.

In the mentioned documentation you can find the following business example:

  1. While working in an app, an accounts payable account determines the need to create a payment request. The accountant creates a free form payment request in My Free Form Payments.

  2. Later, the accountant decides to change the details of the request. They go to the My Free Form Payments app and find the request they have created, make the changes, then notify the cash specialist of the request.

  3. The cash specialist goes to the Process Free Form Payments app and reviews the request, posts it, and releases it. The request is incorporated into a payment batch and enters the approval process.

  4. An accounting manager uses the Monitor Payments app to review the batch containing the payment request to determine the status of the batch in the approval process.

  5. An accounting manager uses the Approve Bank Payments app to approve the payment batch containing the payment request.

This is a nice demonstration of the payment request flow/lifecycle.

Kind regards
Petr Benes
